title: Nursery Rhyme. CXVIII. Scholastic.
content:
My story's ended,
        My spoon is bended:
        If you don't like it,
        Go to the next door,
        And get it mended.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CXVIII. Scholastic."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
